ayahs.textUthmani: كٓهيعٓصٓ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كٓهيعٓصٓ ١
ayahs.textIndopak: كٓهٰيٰـعٓـصٓ​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Kāf, Hā, Yā, ʿAyn, Ṣād.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaaaf-Haa-Yaa-'Ayyyn-Saaad

ayahs.textUthmani: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ ٢
ayahs.textIndopak: ذِكۡرُ رَحۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَـبۡدَهٗ زَكَرِيَّا ​ ۖ ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
ayahs.transliteration: Thikru rahmati Rabbika 'abdahoo Zakariyya

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا ٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ نَادٰى رَبَّهٗ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: When he called to his Lord a private call [i.e., supplication].
ayahs.transliteration: Ith naadaa Rabbahoo nidaaa'an khafiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّىۡ وَهَنَ الۡعَظۡمُ مِنِّىۡ وَاشۡتَعَلَ الرَّاۡسُ شَيۡبًا وَّلَمۡ اَكُنۡۢ بِدُعَآٮِٕكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy [i.e., disappointed].
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbi innee wahanal 'azmu minnee washta-'alar ra'su shaibanw Wa-lam akun bidu'aaa'ika Rabbi shaqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِنِّى خِفْتُ ٱلْمَوَٰلِىَ مِن وَرَآءِى وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا فَهَبْ لِى مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنِّى خِفْتُ ٱلْمَوَٲلِىَ مِن وَرَآءِى وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا فَهَبْ لِى مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِنِّىۡ خِفۡتُ الۡمَوَالِىَ مِنۡ وَّرَآءِىۡ وَكَانَتِ امۡرَاَتِىۡ عَاقِرًا فَهَبۡ لِىۡ مِنۡ لَّدُنۡكَ وَلِيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And indeed, I fear the successors after me, and my wife has been barren, so give me from Yourself an heir
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innee khiftul mawaaliya minw waraaa'ee Wa-kaanat imra atee 'aqiran fa-hablee mil ladunka waliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَرِثُنِى وَيَرِثُ مِنْ ءَالِ يَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَٱجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَرِثُنِى وَيَرِثُ مِنْ ءَالِ يَعْقُوبَ‌ۖ وَٱجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: يَّرِثُنِىۡ وَيَرِثُ مِنۡ اٰلِ يَعۡقُوۡبَ ۖ ​ وَاجۡعَلۡهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Who will inherit me and inherit from the family of Jacob. And make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You]."
ayahs.transliteration: Yarisunee Wa-yarisu min aali Ya'qoob, waj'alhu Rabbi radiyya

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰزَكَرِيَّاۤ اِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلٰم اۨسۡمُهٗ يَحۡيٰى ۙ لَمۡ نَجۡعَلْ لَّهٗ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ سَمِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."
ayahs.transliteration: Yaa-Zakariyyaaa innaa nubashshiruka bi-ghulaamin ismuhoo Yahyaa lam naj'al lahoo min qablu samiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ ٱلْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ ٱلْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبِّ اَنّٰى يَكُوۡنُ لِىۡ غُلٰمٌ وَّكَانَتِ امۡرَاَتِىۡ عَاقِرًا وَّقَدۡ بَلَـغۡتُ مِنَ الۡـكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age?"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbi annaa yakoonu lee ghulaamunw Wa-kaanat imra-atee 'aaqiranw Wa-qad balaghtu minal kibari 'itiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ كَذَٲلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْــًٔا ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ كَذٰلِكَ​ۚ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَّقَدۡ خَلَقۡتُكَ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ تَكُ شَيۡـًٔـا‏
ayahs.translation: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.'"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala kathaalika qaala Rabbuka huwa 'alaiya haiyinunw Wa-qad khalaqtuka min qablu Wa-lam taku shai'aa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً ۚ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَـٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً‌ۚ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَـٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبِّ اجۡعَلْ لِّىۡۤ اٰيَةً​  ؕ قَالَ اٰيَتُكَ اَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ النَّاسَ ثَلٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbij 'al leee Aayah; qaala Aayatuka allaa tukalliman naasa salaasa layaalin sawiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُواْ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَخَرَجَ عَلٰى قَوۡمِهٖ مِنَ الۡمِحۡرَابِ فَاَوۡحٰٓى اِلَيۡهِمۡ اَنۡ سَبِّحُوۡا بُكۡرَةً وَّعَشِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakharaja 'alaa qawmihee minal mihraabi fa-awhaaa ilaihim an sabbihoo bukratanw Wa-'ashiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ‌ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰيَحۡيٰى خُذِ الۡكِتٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ​ ؕ وَاٰتَيۡنٰهُ الۡحُكۡمَ صَبِيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Allāh said], "O John, take the Scripture [i.e., adhere to it] with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy
ayahs.transliteration: Yaa-Yahyaa khuthil Kitaaba biquwwatinw Wa-aatainaahul hukma sabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٲةً‌ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّحَنَانًـا مِّنۡ لَّدُنَّا وَزَكٰوةً  ​ؕ وَّكَانَ تَقِيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allāh
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-hanaanam mil ladunnaa Wa-zakaatanw Wa-kaana taqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَرَّۢا بِوَٲلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّبَرًّۢا بِوَالِدَيۡهِ وَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-barram biwaalidayhi Wa-lam yakum jabbaaran 'asiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَسَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡهِ يَوۡمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوۡمَ يَمُوۡتُ وَيَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُ حَيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-salaamun 'alaihi yawma wulida Wa-yawma yamootu Wa-yawma yub'asu haiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِى الۡـكِتٰبِ مَرۡيَمَ​ۘ اِذِ انْتَبَذَتۡ مِنۡ اَهۡلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرۡقِيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fil Kitaabi Maryma; ithin tabathat min ahlihaa makaanan sharqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاتَّخَذَتۡ مِنۡ دُوۡنِهِمۡ حِجَابًا فَاَرۡسَلۡنَاۤ اِلَيۡهَا رُوۡحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا‏

words.translation: then he assumed for her the likeness
then he assumed for her the likeness

ayahs.translation: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.
ayahs.transliteration: Fattakhathat min doonihim hijaaban fa-arsalnaaa ilaihaa roohanaa fatamassala lahaa basharan sawiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَتۡ اِنِّىۡۤ اَعُوۡذُ بِالرَّحۡمٰنِ مِنۡكَ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ تَقِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaalat inneee a'oothu bir-Rahmaani minka in kunta taqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَـٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۟ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَـٰمًا زَكِيًّا ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: ​قَالَ اِنَّمَاۤ اَنَا رَسُوۡلُ رَبِّكِ ​ ۖ  لِاَهَبَ لَـكِ غُلٰمًا زَكِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son]."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala innamaa ana rasoolu Rabbiki li-ahaba laki ghulaaman zakiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَتۡ اَنّٰى يَكُوۡنُ لِىۡ غُلٰمٌ وَّلَمۡ يَمۡسَسۡنِىۡ بَشَرٌ وَّلَمۡ اَكُ بَغِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaalat anna yakoonu lee ghulaamunw Wa-lam yamsasnee bashrunw Wa-lam aku baghiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ كَذَٲلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ‌ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا‌ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ كَذٰلِكِ​ ۚ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ​ ۚ وَلِنَجۡعَلَهٗۤ اٰيَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحۡمَةً مِّنَّا​ ۚ وَكَانَ اَمۡرًا مَّقۡضِيًّا‏

words.translation: and so that We will make him

ayahs.translation: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala kathaaliki qaala Rabbuki huwa 'alaiya haiyyimunw Wa-linaj-'alahooo Aayatal linnaasi Wa-rahmatam minnaa; Wa-kaana amram maqdiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتْ بِهِۦ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتْ بِهِۦ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: فَحَمَلَـتۡهُ فَانْتَبَذَتۡ بِهٖ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.
ayahs.transliteration: Fahamalat-hu fantabathat bihee makaanan qasiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَـٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَـٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَجَآءَهَا الۡمَخَاضُ اِلٰى جِذۡعِ النَّخۡلَةِ​ۚ قَالَتۡ يٰلَيۡتَنِىۡ مِتُّ قَبۡلَ هٰذَا وَكُنۡتُ نَسۡيًا مَّنۡسِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ajaaa-'ahal makhaadu ilaa jith'in nakhlati qaalat yaa-laitanee mittu qabla haathaa Wa-kuntu nasyam mansiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَنَادَىٰهَا مِن تَحْتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحْزَنِى قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَنَادَٮٰهَا مِن تَحْتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحْزَنِى قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَنَادٰٮهَا مِنۡ تَحۡتِهَاۤ اَلَّا تَحۡزَنِىۡ قَدۡ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: But he called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.
ayahs.transliteration: Fanaadaahaa min tahtihaaa allaa tahzanee qad ja'ala Rabbuki tahtaki sariyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَهُزِّىٓ إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ تُسَـٰقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَهُزِّىٓ إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ تُسَـٰقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَهُزِّىۡۤ اِلَيۡكِ بِجِذۡعِ النَّخۡلَةِ تُسٰقِطۡ عَلَيۡكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-huzzeee ilaiki bijith-'in nakhlati tusaaqit 'alaiki rutaban janiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكُلِى وَٱشْرَبِى وَقَرِّى عَيْنًا ۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِىٓ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكُلِى وَٱشْرَبِى وَقَرِّى عَيْنًا‌ۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِىٓ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكُلِىۡ وَاشۡرَبِىۡ وَقَرِّىۡ عَيۡنًا​ ۚ فَاِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ الۡبَشَرِ اَحَدًا ۙ فَقُوۡلِىۡۤ اِنِّىۡ نَذَرۡتُ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ صَوۡمًا فَلَنۡ اُكَلِّمَ الۡيَوۡمَ اِنۡسِيًّا ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So eat and drink and be contented. And if you see from among humanity anyone, say, 'Indeed, I have vowed to the Most Merciful abstention, so I will not speak today to [any] man.'"
ayahs.transliteration: Fakulee washrabee Wa-qarree 'ainaa; fa-immaa tarayinnna minal bashari ahadan faqooleee innee nathartu lir-Rahmaani sawman falan ukallimal yawma insiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ ۖ قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْـًٔا فَرِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ‌ۖ قَالُواْ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْــًٔا فَرِيًّا ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَتَتۡ بِهٖ قَوۡمَهَا تَحۡمِلُهٗ​ؕ قَالُوۡا يٰمَرۡيَمُ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتِ شَيۡـًٔـا فَرِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-atat bihee qawmahaa tahmiluhoo qaaloo yaa-Maryamoo laqad ji'ti shai'an fariyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰٓأُخْتَ هَـٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأُخْتَ هَـٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰۤـاُخۡتَ هٰرُوۡنَ مَا كَانَ اَ بُوۡكِ امۡرَاَ سَوۡءٍ وَّمَا كَانَتۡ اُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا​ ۖ​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: O sister [i.e., descendant] of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste."
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa-ukhta Haaroona maa kaana abooki mra'a saw'inw Wa-maa kaanat ummuki baghiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ ۖ قَالُوا۟ كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ‌ۖ قَالُواْ كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَشَارَتۡ اِلَيۡهِ​ ؕ قَالُوۡا كَيۡفَ نُـكَلِّمُ مَنۡ كَانَ فِى الۡمَهۡدِ صَبِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?"
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ashaarat ilaih; qaaloo kaifa nukallimu man kaana fil mahdi sabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ إِنِّى عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِىَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِى نَبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ إِنِّى عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَـٰنِىَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِى نَبِيًّا ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اِنِّىۡ عَبۡدُ اللّٰهِ ؕ اٰتٰٮنِىَ الۡكِتٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِىۡ نَبِيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allāh. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala innee 'abdul laahi aataaniyal Kitaaba Wa-ja'alanee Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَـٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَـٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٲةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٲةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّجَعَلَنِىۡ مُبٰـرَكًا اَيۡنَ مَا كُنۡتُ وَاَوۡصٰنِىۡ بِالصَّلٰوةِ وَالزَّكٰوةِ مَا دُمۡتُ حَيًّا ​ۖ ‏
ayahs.translation: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakāh as long as I remain alive
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ja'alanee mubaarakan aina maa kuntu Wa-awsaanee bis-Salaati waz-Zakaati maa dumtu haiyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَتِى وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَرَّۢا بِوَٲلِدَتِى وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّبَرًّۢابِوَالِدَتِىۡ وَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡنِىۡ جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-barram biwaalidatee Wa-lam yaj'alnee jabbaaran shaqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالسَّلٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوۡمَ وُلِدْتُّ وَيَوۡمَ اَمُوۡتُ وَيَوۡمَ اُبۡعَثُ حَيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive."
ayahs.transliteration: Wassalaamu 'alaiya yawma wulidtu Wa-yawma amootu Wa-yawma ub'asu haiyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ ۚ قَوْلَ ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذَٲلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ‌ۚ قَوْلَ ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: ذٰ لِكَ عِيۡسَى ابۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ ​ۚ قَوۡلَ الۡحَـقِّ الَّذِىۡ فِيۡهِ يَمۡتَرُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.
ayahs.transliteration: Thaalika 'Eesab nu Maryama; qawlal haqqil lathee feehi yamtaroon

ayahs.textUthmani: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ ۖ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥٓ ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ‌ۖ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥٓ‌ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: مَا كَانَ لِلّٰهِ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ مِنۡ وَّلَدٍ​ۙ سُبۡحٰنَهٗ​ؕ اِذَا قَضٰٓى اَمۡرًا فَاِنَّمَا يَقُوۡلُ لَهٗ كُنۡ فَيَكُوۡنُؕ‏
ayahs.translation: It is not [befitting] for Allāh to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is.
ayahs.transliteration: Maa kaana lillaahi aien yattakhitha minw waladin Subhaanah; ithaa qadaaa amran fa-innamaa yaqoolu lahoo kun fa-yakoon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ‌ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٲطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِنَّ اللّٰهَ رَبِّىۡ وَرَبُّكُمۡ فَاعۡبُدُوۡهُ ​ؕ هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسۡتَقِيۡمٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Jesus said], "And indeed, Allāh is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is a straight path."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innal laaha Rabbee Wa-Rabbukum fa'budooh; haathaa Siraatum Mustaqeem

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ مِنۢ بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن مَّشْهَدِ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ مِنۢ بَيْنِهِمْ‌ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن مَّشْهَدِ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاخۡتَلَفَ الۡاَحۡزَابُ مِنۡۢ بَيۡنِهِمۡ​ۚ فَوَيۡلٌ لِّـلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا مِنۡ مَّشۡهَدِ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Then the factions differed [concerning Jesus] from among them, so woe to those who disbelieved - from the scene of a tremendous Day.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakhtalafal ahzaabu min bainihim fawailul lillatheena kafaroo min mashhadi Yawmin 'azeem

ayahs.textUthmani: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا ۖ لَـٰكِنِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا‌ۖ لَـٰكِنِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اَسۡمِعۡ بِهِمۡ وَاَبۡصِرۡۙ يَوۡمَ يَاۡتُوۡنَنَا​ لٰـكِنِ الظّٰلِمُوۡنَ الۡيَوۡمَ فِىۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍ‏
ayahs.translation: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.
ayahs.transliteration: Asmi' bihim Wa-absir Yawma ya'toonanaa laakiniz zaalimoonal yawma fee dalaalin mubeen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَنۡذِرۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَ الۡحَسۡرَةِ اِذۡ قُضِىَ الۡاَمۡرُ​​ۘ وَهُمۡ فِىۡ غَفۡلَةٍ وَّهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-anthirhum Yawmal hasrati ith qudiyal amr; Wa-hum fee ghaflatinw Wa-hum laa yu'minoon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَرِثُ الۡاَرۡضَ وَمَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا وَاِلَـيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa nahnu narisul arda Wa-man 'alaihaa Wa-ilainaa yurja'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِبْرَٲهِيمَ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِى الۡكِتٰبِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ ۙ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صِدِّيۡقًا نَّبِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fil Kitaabi Ibraaheem; innahoo kaana siddeeqan Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنكَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنكَ شَيْــًٔا ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ يٰۤـاَبَتِ لِمَ تَعۡبُدُ مَا لَا يَسۡمَعُ وَلَا يُبۡصِرُ وَ لَا يُغۡنِىۡ عَنۡكَ شَيۡــًٔـا‏
ayahs.translation: [Mention] when he said to his father, "O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala li-abeehi yaaa-abati lima ta'budu maa laa yasma'u Wa-laa yubsiru Wa-laa yughnee 'anka shai'aa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٲطًا سَوِيًّا ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰۤـاَبَتِ اِنِّىۡ قَدۡ جَآءَنِىۡ مِنَ الۡعِلۡمِ مَا لَمۡ يَاۡتِكَ فَاتَّبِعۡنِىۡۤ اَهۡدِكَ صِرَاطًا سَوِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa-abati innee qad jaaa'anee minal 'ilmi maa lam ya'tika fattabi'neee ahdika siraatan Sawiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ‌ۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَصِيًّا ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰۤـاَبَتِ لَا تَعۡبُدِ الشَّيۡطٰنَ​ ؕ اِنَّ الشَّيۡطٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ عَصِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa-abati laa ta'budish Shaitaan; innash Shaitaana kaana lir-Rahmaani 'asiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطَـٰنِ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطَـٰنِ وَلِيًّا ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: يٰۤاَبَتِ اِنِّىۡۤ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ فَتَكُوۡنَ لِلشَّيۡطٰنِ وَلِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]."
ayahs.transliteration: Yaaa-abati innee akhaafu aien yamassaka 'athaabum minar Rahmaani fatakoona lish-Shaitaani waliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ ۖ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يَـٰٓإِبْرَٲهِيمُ‌ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ‌ۖ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا ٤٦
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اَرَاغِبٌ اَنۡتَ عَنۡ اٰلِهَتِىۡ يٰۤاِبۡرٰهِيۡمُ​ۚ لَٮِٕنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ لَاَرۡجُمَنَّكَ​ وَاهۡجُرۡنِىۡ مَلِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala araaghibun anta 'an aalihatee yaaa-Ibraaheemu la-'il lam tantahi la-arjumannaka wahjurnee maliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ‌ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ‌ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ سَلٰمٌ عَلَيۡكَ​ۚ سَاَسۡتَغۡفِرُ لَـكَ رَبِّىۡؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ بِىۡ حَفِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Abraham] said, "Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala salaamun 'alaika sa-astaghfiru laka Rabbeee innahoo kaana bee hafiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُواْ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا ٤٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ اَعۡتَزِلُـكُمۡ وَمَا تَدۡعُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ وَاَدۡعُوۡا رَبِّىۡ​ ​ۖ  عَسٰٓى اَلَّاۤ اَكُوۡنَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّىۡ شَقِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed]."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-a'tazilukum Wa-maa tad'oona min doonil laahi Wa-ad'oo Rabbee 'asaaa allaaa akoona bidu'aaa'i Rabbee shaqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ‌ۖ وَكُلاًّ جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا ٤٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَمَّا اعۡتَزَلَهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَ مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ ۙ وَهَبۡنَا لَهٗۤ اِسۡحٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوۡبَ​ ؕ وَكُلًّا جَعَلۡنَا نَبِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-lam ma'tazalahum Wa-maa ya'budoona min doonil laahi wahabnaa lahoo is-haaqa Wa-ya'qoob; Wa-kullan ja'alnaa Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا ٥٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُمۡ مِّنۡ رَّحۡمَتِنَا وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ عَلِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa wahabnaa lahum mirrahmatinaa Wa-ja'alnaa lahum lisaana sidqin 'aliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولاً نَّبِيًّا ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِى الۡكِتٰبِ مُوۡسٰٓى​ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مُخۡلَصًا وَّكَانَ رَسُوۡلًا نَّبِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fil Kitaabi Moosaaa; innahoo kaana mukhlasanw Wa-kaana Rasoolan Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَـٰهُ نَجِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَـٰهُ نَجِيًّا ٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَنَادَيۡنٰهُ مِنۡ جَانِبِ الطُّوۡرِ الۡاَيۡمَنِ وَقَرَّبۡنٰهُ نَجِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-naadainaahu min jaanibit Tooril aimani Wa-qarrabnaahu najiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا ٥٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ وَهَبۡنَا لَهٗ مِنۡ رَّحۡمَتِنَاۤ اَخَاهُ هٰرُوۡنَ نَبِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-wahabnaa lahoo mir rahmatinaaa akhaahu Haaroona Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولاً نَّبِيًّا ٥٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِى الۡـكِتٰبِ اِسۡمٰعِيۡلَ​ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صَادِقَ الۡوَعۡدِ وَكَانَ رَسُوۡلًا نَّبِيًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fil Kitaabi ismaa'eel; innahoo kaana saadiqal wa'di Wa-kaana Rasoolan Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٲةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٲةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا ٥٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ كَانَ يَاۡمُرُ اَهۡلَهٗ بِالصَّلٰوةِ وَالزَّكٰوةِ وَكَانَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهٖ مَرۡضِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kaana ya'muru ahlahoo bis-Salaati waz-zakaati Wa-kaana 'inda Rabbihee mardiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا ٥٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاذۡكُرۡ فِى الۡكِتٰبِ اِدۡرِيۡسَ​ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ صِدِّيۡقًا نَّبِيًّا ۙ ‏
ayahs.translation: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkur fil Kitaabi Idrees; innahoo kaana siddeeqan Nabiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَرَفَعْنَـٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَرَفَعْنَـٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا ٥٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّرَفَعۡنٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And We raised him to a high station.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-rafa'naahu makaanan 'aliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ ۚ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا ۩
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّــۧنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرَٲهِيمَ وَإِسْرَٲٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ‌ۚ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ خَرُّواْ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا ۩ ٥٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اُولٰٓٮِٕكَ الَّذِيۡنَ اَنۡعَمَ اللّٰهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنَ النَّبِيّٖنَ مِنۡ ذُرِّيَّةِ اٰدَمَ وَمِمَّنۡ حَمَلۡنَا مَعَ نُوۡحٍ وَّمِنۡ ذُرِّيَّةِ اِبۡرٰهِيۡمَ وَاِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ وَمِمَّنۡ هَدَيۡنَا وَاجۡتَبَيۡنَا​ ؕ اِذَا تُتۡلٰى عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُ الرَّحۡمٰنِ خَرُّوۡا سُجَّدًا وَّبُكِيًّا ۩‏
ayahs.translation: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.
ayahs.transliteration: Ulaaa'ikal latheena an'amal laahu 'alaihim minan Nabiyyeena min thurriyyati Aadama Wa-mimman hamalnaa ma'a Noohinw Wa-min thurriyyati Ibraaheema Wa-Israaa'eela Wa-mimman hadainaa wajta-bainaaa; ithaa tutlaa 'alaihim Aayaatur Rahmaani kharroo sujjadanw Wa-bukiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَوَٰتِ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٲةَ وَٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلشَّهَوَٲتِ‌ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا ٥٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَخَلَفَ مِنۡۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٌ اَضَاعُوا الصَّلٰوةَ وَاتَّبَعُوا الشَّهَوٰتِ​ فَسَوۡفَ يَلۡقَوۡنَ غَيًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: But there came after them successors [i.e., later generations] who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -
ayahs.transliteration: Fakhalafa min ba'dihim khalfun adaa'us Salaata wattaba'ush shahawaati fasawfa yalqawna ghaiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْــًٔا ٦٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا مَنۡ تَابَ وَاٰمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًـا فَاُولٰٓٮِٕكَ يَدۡخُلُوۡنَ الۡجَـنَّةَ وَلَا يُظۡلَمُوۡنَ شَيۡــًٔـا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.
ayahs.transliteration: Illaa man taaba Wa-aamana Wa-'amila saalihan fa-ulaaa'ika yadkhuloonal jannata Wa-laa yuzlamoona shai'aa

ayahs.textUthmani: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا ٦١
ayahs.textIndopak: جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنٍ اۨلَّتِىۡ وَعَدَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ عِبَادَهٗ بِالۡغَيۡبِ​ ؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ وَعۡدُهٗ مَاۡتِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been eminent.
ayahs.transliteration: Jannaati 'adninil latee wa'adar Rahmaanu ibaadahoo bilghaib; innahoo kaana wa'duhoo ma'tiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَـٰمًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَـٰمًا‌ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا ٦٢
ayahs.textIndopak: لَّا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَـغۡوًا اِلَّا سَلٰمًا​ؕ وَلَهُمۡ رِزۡقُهُمۡ فِيۡهَا بُكۡرَةً وَّعَشِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yasma'oona feehaa laghwan illaa salaamaa; Wa-lahum rizquhum feehaa bukratanw Wa-'ashiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا ٦٣
ayahs.textIndopak: تِلۡكَ الۡجَـنَّةُ الَّتِىۡ نُوۡرِثُ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا مَنۡ كَانَ تَقِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allāh.
ayahs.transliteration: Tilkal jannatul latee noorisu min 'ibaadinaa man kaana taqiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ‌ۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٲلِكَ‌ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا ٦٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ اِلَّا بِاَمۡرِ رَبِّكَ​ ۚ لَهٗ مَا بَيۡنَ اَيۡدِيۡنَا وَمَا خَلۡفَنَا وَمَا بَيۡنَ ذٰ لِكَ​ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa natanazzalu illaa bi-amri Rabbika lahoo maa baina aideenaa Wa-maa khalfanaa Wa-maa baina thaalik; Wa-maa kaana Rabbuka nasiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَـٰدَتِهِۦ ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَـٰدَتِهِۦ‌ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا ٦٥
ayahs.textIndopak: رَّبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فَاعۡبُدۡهُ وَاصۡطَبِرۡ لِـعِبَادَتِهٖ​ؕ هَلۡ تَعۡلَمُ لَهٗ سَمِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa fa'bud-hu wastabir li'ibaadatih; hal ta'lamu lahoo samiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا ٦٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَيَقُوۡلُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ ءَاِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوۡفَ اُخۡرَجُ حَيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-yaqoolul insaanu 'a-ithaa maa mittu lasawfa ukhraju haiyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْــًٔا ٦٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اَوَلَا يَذۡكُرُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ اَنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُ مِنۡ قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ يَكُ شَيۡـًٔـا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?
ayahs.transliteration: A-Wa-laa yathkurul insaanu annaa khalaqnaahu min qablu Wa-lam yaku shai'aa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا ٦٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَـنَحۡشُرَنَّهُمۡ وَالشَّيٰطِيۡنَ ثُمَّ لَــنُحۡضِرَنَّهُمۡ حَوۡلَ جَهَـنَّمَ جِثِيًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.
ayahs.transliteration: Fawa-Rabbika lanahshu-rannahum wash-shayaateena summa lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jisiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عِتِيًّا ٦٩
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ لَـنَنۡزِعَنَّ مِنۡ كُلِّ شِيۡعَةٍ اَيُّهُمۡ اَشَدُّ عَلَى الرَّحۡمٰنِ عِتِيًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.
ayahs.transliteration: Summa lanan-zi'anna min kulli shee'atin aiyuhum ashaddu 'alar Rahmaani 'itiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا ٧٠
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ لَـنَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِالَّذِيۡنَ هُمۡ اَوۡلٰى بِهَا صِلِيًّا‏
ayahs.translation: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.
ayahs.transliteration: Summa lanahnu a'lamu billatheena hum awlaa bihaa siliyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا‌ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا ٧١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِنۡ مِّنْکُمْ اِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ​ؕ كَانَ عَلٰى رَبِّكَ حَتۡمًا مَّقۡضِيًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-in minkum illaa waariduhaa; kaana 'alaa Rabbika hatmam maqdiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَواْ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا ٧٢
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ نُـنَجِّى الَّذِيۡنَ اتَّقَوْا وَّنَذَرُ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَ فِيۡهَا جِثِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.
ayahs.transliteration: Summa nunajjil latheenat taqaw Wa-natharuth zaalimeena feehaa jisiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا بَيِّنَـٰتٍ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَىُّ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا بَيِّنَـٰتٍ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَىُّ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا ٧٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِذَا تُتۡلٰى عَلَيۡهِمۡ اٰيٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ قَالَ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لِلَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡۤا ۙ اَىُّ الۡفَرِيۡقَيۡنِ خَيۡرٌ مَّقَامًا وَّاَحۡسَنُ نَدِيًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association?"
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ithaa tutlaa 'alaihim Aayaatunaa baiyinaatin qaalal latheena kafaroo lillatheena aamanooo aiyul fareeqaini khairum maqaamanw Wa-ahsanu nadiyyaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثَـٰثًا وَرِءْيًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثَـٰثًا وَرِءْيًا ٧٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ اَحۡسَنُ اَثَاثًا وَّرِءۡيًا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu asaasanw Wa-ri'yaa

ayahs.textUthmani: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلضَّلَـٰلَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مَدًّا ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلضَّلَـٰلَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مَدًّا‌ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا ٧٥
ayahs.textIndopak: قُلۡ مَنۡ كَانَ فِى الضَّلٰلَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ لَهُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ مَدًّا ۚ​ حَتّٰٓى اِذَا رَاَوۡا مَا يُوۡعَدُوۡنَ اِمَّا الۡعَذَابَ وَاِمَّا السَّاعَةَ ؕ فَسَيَـعۡلَمُوۡنَ مَنۡ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَّاَضۡعَفُ جُنۡدًا‏
ayahs.translation: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers."
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man kaana fid da-laalati falyamdud lahur Rahmaanu maddaa; hattaaa ithaa ra-aw maa yoo'adoona immal 'athaaba Wa-immas Saa'ata fasa-ya'lamoona man huwa sharrum makaananw Wa-ad'afu jundaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟ هُدًى ۗ وَٱلْبَـٰقِيَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْاْ هُدًى‌ۗ وَٱلْبَـٰقِيَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا ٧٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَيَزِيۡدُ اللّٰهُ الَّذِيۡنَ اهۡتَدَوۡا هُدًى​ؕ وَالۡبٰقِيٰتُ الصّٰلِحٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِنۡدَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَّخَيۡرٌ مَّرَدًّا‏
ayahs.translation: And Allāh increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-yazeedul laahul latheenah tadaw hudaa; wal-baaqiyaatus saalihaatu khairun 'inda Rabbika sawaabanw Wa-khairum maraddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔـايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالاً وَوَلَدًا ٧٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اَفَرَءَيۡتَ الَّذِىۡ كَفَرَ بِاٰيٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَاُوۡتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَّوَلَدًا ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]"?
ayahs.transliteration: Afara'aytal lathee kafara bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-qaala la-oota-yanna maalanw Wa-waladaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلْغَيْبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلْغَيْبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا ٧٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اَطَّلَعَ الۡغَيۡبَ اَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِنۡدَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَهۡدًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?
ayahs.transliteration: At-tala'al ghaiba 'amit takhatha 'indar Rahmaani 'ahdaa

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّا ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ مَدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا‌ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ مَدًّا ٧٩
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّا ​ ؕ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا يَقُوۡلُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهٗ مِنَ الۡعَذَابِ مَدًّا ۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: No! We will record what he says and extend [i.e., increase] for him from the punishment extensively.
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaa; sanaktubu maa yaqoolu Wa-namuddu lahoo minal 'athaabi maddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا ٨٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّنَرِثُهٗ مَا يَقُوۡلُ وَيَاۡتِيۡنَا فَرۡدًا‏

words.translation: and he will come to Us

ayahs.translation: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-narisuhoo maa yaqoolu Wa-ya'teenaa fardaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمْ عِزًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُواْ لَهُمْ عِزًّا ٨١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاتَّخَذُوۡا مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ اٰلِهَةً لِّيَكُوۡنُوۡا لَهُمۡ عِزًّا ۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.
ayahs.transliteration: Wattakhathoo min doonil laahi aalihatal liyakoonoo lahum 'izzaa

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّا ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا‌ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا ٨٢
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّا​ ؕ سَيَكۡفُرُوۡنَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَيَكُوۡنُوۡنَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضِدًّا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: No! They [i.e., those "gods"] will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement].
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaa; sa-yakfuroona bi'ibaadatihim Wa-yakoonoona 'alaihim diddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا ٨٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّاۤ اَرۡسَلۡنَا الشَّيٰـطِيۡنَ عَلَى الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ اَزًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them [to evil] with [constant] incitement?
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara annaaa arsalnash Shayaateena 'alal kaafireena ta'uzzuhum azzaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ‌ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا ٨٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ​ ؕ اِنَّمَا نَـعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدًّا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So be not impatient over them. We only count out [i.e., allow] to them a [limited] number.
ayahs.transliteration: Falaa ta'jal alaihim innamaa na-'uddu lahum 'addaa

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَفْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَفْدًا ٨٥
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ اِلَى الرَّحۡمٰنِ وَفۡدًا​ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma nahshurul muttaqeena ilar Rahmaani wafdaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا ٨٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّنَسُوۡقُ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ اِلٰى جَهَـنَّمَ وِرۡدًا​ ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-nasooqul mujrimeena ilaa Jahannama wirdaa

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا ٨٧
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا يَمۡلِكُوۡنَ الشَّفَاعَةَ اِلَّا مَنِ اتَّخَذَ عِنۡدَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَهۡدًا​ ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yamlikoonash shafaa'ata illaa manit takhatha 'indar Rahmaani 'ahdaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَالُواْ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا ٨٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَقَالُوۡا اتَّخَذَ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وَلَدًا ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qaalut takhathar Rahmaanu waladaa

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْــًٔا إِدًّا ٨٩
ayahs.textIndopak: لَـقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَيۡــًٔـا اِدًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: You have done an atrocious thing.
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad ji'tum shai'an iddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا ٩٠
ayahs.textIndopak: تَكَادُ السَّمٰوٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَـنۡشَقُّ الۡاَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ الۡجِبَالُ هَدًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
ayahs.transliteration: Takaadus samaawaatu yatafattarna minhu Wa-tanshaq qul-ardu Wa-takhirrul jibaalu haddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَن دَعَوْاْ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدًا ٩١
ayahs.textIndopak: اَنۡ دَعَوۡا لِـلرَّحۡمٰنِ وَلَدًا​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.
ayahs.transliteration: An da'aw lir-Rahmaani waladaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا ٩٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا يَنۡۢبَـغِىۡ لِلرَّحۡمٰنِ اَنۡ يَّتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa yambaghee li-Rahmaani aien yattakhitha waladaa

ayahs.textUthmani: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَبْدًا ٩٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنۡ كُلُّ مَنۡ فِى السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ اِلَّاۤ اٰتِى الرَّحۡمٰنِ عَبۡدًا ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.
ayahs.transliteration: In kullu man fis samaawaati wal-ardi illaaa aatir Rahmaani 'abdaa

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَـٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا ٩٤
ayahs.textIndopak: لَـقَدۡ اَحۡصٰٮهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدًّا‏
ayahs.translation: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad ahsaahum Wa-addahum 'addaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ فَرْدًا ٩٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكُلُّهُمۡ اٰتِيۡهِ يَوۡمَ الۡقِيٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا‏
ayahs.translation: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kulluhum aateehi Yawmal Qiyaamati fardaa

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّا ٩٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ الرَّحۡمٰنُ وُدًّا‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
ayahs.transliteration: Innal latheena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati sa-yaj'alu lahumur Rahmaanu wuddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا ٩٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ وَتُنۡذِرَ بِهٖ قَوۡمًا لُّدًّا‏

words.translation: that you may give glad tidings

ayahs.translation: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-innamaa yassarnaahu bilisaanika litubashshira bihil muttaqeena Wa-tunthira bihee qawmal luddaa

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًۢا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزَۢا ٩٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍؕ هَلۡ تُحِسُّ مِنۡهُمۡ مِّنۡ اَحَدٍ اَوۡ تَسۡمَعُ لَهُمۡ رِكۡزًا‏
ayahs.translation: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qabla-hum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasma'u lahum rikzaa
